name: Date Pudding Cake (Bon Appetit/July 1983)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 9 x 9-inch baking pan.
3. Beat the eggs in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating until thick.
5. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Mix in chopped dates and nuts.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for about 30 minutes.
9. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream.
